calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Judgment1
Off Calendar Feb-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC Motion To Set Aside Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. The Court adopts its tentative ruling issued for December 22, 2022 hearing. While it was suggested at December 22, 2022 hearing that the Court has jurisdiction to rule on the merits, the supplemental brief filed by the petitioner does not support this contention devoting 8 lines of citations and no analysis to this issue. (The Court notes that these citations add nothing on the issue of void judgment that had not been addressed in the moving memorandum of points authorities and that CCP 473(d) was no listed as grounds for the motion in the Notice of Motion filed on November 14, 2022). The Court did not have jurisdiction on December 22, 2022. Therefore, the original tentative ruling stands and the Motion to Set Aside judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Unauthorized reply filed on February 2, 2022 is stricken. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion To Set Aside Judgment1
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Continued To Feb-03-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT

Appearances: David Blackwell of Allen Matkins (415.837.1515) for petitioner and moving party; Kristen Jensen of the City Attorney's Office (415.554.4700) for respondent and opposing party.

Mr. Blackwell states he would like a hearing to be held on the motion. The Court continues the matter to February 3, 2023. Petitioner is to file a brief regarding the Court's jurisdiction to hear the motion in light of the appeal by January 20, 2023. Respondent may file a reply by January 30, 2023. Counsel waive notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
